column1: SmartRAG — Trimmed Datastore + LLM API Cost Model

Edit the INPUT cells (mostly column B; provider prices B13:D15; tiers B18:D19). Open in Excel or Google Sheets and formulas recompute. Prices are representative (early 2026) — verify live before pricing decisions.
Ingestion dominates total cost. Set MAX_GLEANING=0 to cut extraction ~35% (lower rows 5 and 6 by ~35%).
Self-host embeddings (bge-m3): set row 7 and Embed prices D13:D15 to 0.
Query context scales with CHUNK_TOP_K (default 20). Lower it to cut row 8 (LLM input / query).
Prices change frequently — overwrite B13:D15 with live quotes. AWS infra swap: set B21 to ~95.
